title: epithelantha spinosior subsp. spinosior
intro: Epithelantha spinosior subsp. spinosior, also known as the lesser pincushion cactus, is a type of flowering succulent plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Epithelantha spinosior subsp. spinosior include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making a tea or infusion from the stems and roots, or using it in capsule or tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
